seoDescription: Explore career opportunities at Palm & Light Coffee in San Mateo.

lookingFor.title: Who we
lookingFor.p1: We hire with care and keep our standards high. We look for people who move with composure, respect the craft, and notice the details that shape a guest's experience.
lookingFor.p2: Experience is welcome, but mindset matters most: humility, consistency, and a genuine instinct for hospitality.

items.name: Palm
items.description: We never finish learning. Feedback and steady refinement are part of the work.

items.name: Hospitality
items.description: Every guest interaction should feel considered, warm, and precise.

items.name: Craft
items.description: We honor ingredients and process through discipline and attention.

application.title: Apply
application.body1: We take hiring seriously because the experience matters.
application.body3: Download the form below, take your time, and send it to us when you're ready.
application.body4: Please attach your resume when submitting your application.
